title: Bitter Baked Broccoli Bowl
description: A simple yet flavorful side dish featuring roasted broccoli and a hint of bitterness from the bitter greens.
instructions: 2. Rinse the broccoli crowns and cut them into florets.
3. In a large bowl, toss the broccoli with olive oil, salt, and pepper until well coated.
4. Spread the broccoli on a baking sheet and roast for 15-20 minutes.
5. While the broccoli is roasting, wash and chop the bitter greens.
6. In a separate bowl, toss the chopped bitter greens with a pinch of salt and pepper.
7. To assemble the bowls, place a serving of roasted broccoli on a plate and top with a spoonful of bitter greens.
